strategic_objective: Characterize the stability and origin of strong linear dependencies among packet and flag features to clarify redundancy and its impact on feature dimensionality.
key_checks: Verify stability of strong linear dependencies across different temporal segments and attack phases
Distinguish whether dependencies arise from protocol constraints or dataset-specific artifacts
Assess impact of removing redundant features on information retention and robustness
success_criteria: Dependencies remain stable or vary systematically with temporal or attack context
Clear evidence whether dependencies reflect inherent protocol structure or dataset artifacts
Identified redundant features whose removal does not degrade critical information
router_constraints: preserve feature_scope for correlated packet and flag features
